results.prediction: Maxwell clemency decision by Trump DOJ
results.description: Ghislaine Maxwell is actively seeking clemency and is among the prominent candidates for presidential pardon according to recent reporting. Congressional oversight is intensifying with House Oversight Chair James Comer subpoenaing Attorney General Pam Bondi for an April 14 deposition regarding the DOJ's handling of the Epstein investigation and Maxwell's case. No final clemency decision has been announced as of March 2026.

results.prediction: Iran war ceasefire or major escalation
results.description: The Iran-US conflict remains active with no ceasefire achieved as of March 31, 2026. Iran has rejected US ceasefire proposals and denies engaging in direct negotiations, while Trump claims talks are ongoing. Recent reports indicate Iran's economy faces potential collapse within weeks without a ceasefire, suggesting pressure for resolution.

results.prediction: Strait of Hormuz full shipping restoration
results.description: The Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed as of March 2026, with Iran maintaining a de facto stranglehold on shipping. While Iran has allowed selective passage for Chinese, Indian, Pakistani, and Malaysian vessels through diplomatic arrangements, approximately 2,000 ships from other nations remain stranded on either side of the waterway. Full shipping restoration has not been achieved.
